description_long: This object is a compact electronic device with a rectangular black body and a brushed metal swivel cover. The metal cover features a circular cutout near one end and is engraved with the word 'AIRCOINS' and a cloud logo, along with the phrase 'AUGMENT YOUR REALITY.' The black body houses a small digital display, which is visible through the open cover and currently shows the word 'Ethereum.' The back of the device displays regulatory symbols such as CE and FCC, indicating compliance with electronic standards. One end of the device has a visible USB connector, suggesting it is designed to interface with computers or other electronic equipment. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a combination of matte and metallic finishes.
description: A compact electronic device with a black body, brushed metal swivel cover, digital display, and USB connector, featuring 'AIRCOINS' branding.
description_view_0: The device is shown with its metal cover partially open, revealing the digital display and 'AIRCOINS' branding.
description_view_1: A side profile view showing the slimness of the device and the alignment of the metal cover with the black body.
description_view_2: The back of the device displays regulatory symbols on the black body and the brushed metal cover with its circular cutout.
description_view_3: An end view highlighting the USB connector and the thickness of the device.
